title: Vaccinated
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/cKBQmhZr/images/9dc0dc014611ed4f1e4dea32f9e9fd5bbbbbe76c.png)
### A Fabric mod adding Syringes, a new and fun way to kill, to the game!
Vaccinated is a little mod that adds Syringes. Syringes can be used as weapons, buffs or just a way to spice up fights! 
## Features
### Items:
- **Empty Syringe**: Right click with an Empty Syringe to deal 18 damage to yourself and **possibly** (50% chance of failure) fill it up with blood. If the Syringe does not fill up with blood it will crack, giving your a Cracked Syringe.
- **Efficient Syringe**: The Efficient Syringe does the same job as the Empty Syringe but with a higher chance of success.
- **Cracked Syringe**: If you fail to extract blood with an Efficient or Empty Syringe, you will get a Cracked Syringe. These can be combined with Iron Nuggets to easily craft another Empty Syringe.
- **Filled Syringe**: Filled Syringes can be combined with many things to make a variety of 'flavoured' Syringes, like the Lead Filled Syringe, the Adrenaline Filled Syringe and the Virus Filled Syringe. These can be used by the Syringe Mixer, or can be right clicked or used as a weapon to apply the effects by themselves.
- **Syringe Mixer**:The Syringe Mixer works like any other syringe, but when right clicked or hit with will attempt to use any available syringes in your inventory. It will only use one of each syringe available. Great for applying heaps of effects at once!
